i2c_addr.description: I2C device address in hex without 0x prefix (default: 28 = 0x28)

axis_remap.description: BNO055 axis placement configuration: P0-P7 (see datasheet Table 3-4)

sensor_mode.description: BNO055 fusion mode: NDOF (absolute, 9-DOF), NDOF_FMC_OFF (absolute, fast mag-cal disabled), IMUPLUS (relative, 6-DOF, no magnetometer)

calib_file.description: Absolute path to calibration YAML file (see config/bno055_calib.yaml). Empty = start uncalibrated and rely on in-sensor auto-calibration.

publish_tf.description: Publish a dynamic world→base_link TF from IMU orientation for RViz visualization

publish_diagnostics.description: Run the bno055_diagnostics companion node to publish sensor health and calibration status to /diagnostics at 1 Hz

publish_tf_from_calibration.description: Enables TF publishing from camera calibration file.

override_cam_model.description: Overrides camera model from calibration file.

fusion_mode.description: EKF sensor fusion mode: base = wheel odom + BNO055 (ekf.yaml); imu = BNO055 only, no wheel odom (ekf_imu.yaml); odom = wheel odom only, no IMU (ekf_odom.yaml).

config.description: Robot configuration: base, pantilt, or k2

custom_filter.description: (Optional) Name of custom filter config YAML in lekiwi_bringup/config/

diagnostics.description: Launch motor and IMU diagnostics nodes

pointcloud.description: Enable RGBD point cloud output from OAK-D (uses oakd_vio_pcl.yaml)

serial_port.description: Serial port for STS motor communication

pan_center_steps.description: Encoder step that maps to 0 rad for the pan joint

tilt_center_steps.description: Encoder step that maps to 0 rad for the tilt joint

teleop_config.description: Path to the joy_teleop configuration file

diagnostics.description: Launch motor and IMU diagnostics nodes

fusion_mode.description: EKF sensor fusion mode (passed to nav.launch.py): base = wheel odom + BNO055; imu = BNO055 only (test platform); odom = wheel odom only (mock / debug).

pointcloud.description: Enable RGBD point cloud output from OAK-D (uses oakd_vio_pcl.yaml)
